rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

layout_and_spacing.grid: Use bento grid architecture (asymmetrical, dense) for dashboards and feature highlights.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px) to maintain rigid industrial feel.

components.header: Sticky glassmorphism header: bg-[#060A14]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1E293B]. Never fully transparent.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#FF9F1C] text-black font-bold uppercase. Hover: brighter, slightly scaled.
components.cards: Solid background (#0A1128), 1px solid border (#1E293B). Hover: border-[#FF9F1C]/40 with subtle drop-shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn components customized with rounded-none, border-[#1E293B], focus:border-[#FF9F1C].

animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up for list items. Framer motion for hero text.
animations.interactions: Micro-interactions on hover (translate-y, border color shift).

specific_pages.Home: Hero carousel auto-sliding. Brand logo ticker (react-fast-marquee). Features section.
specific_pages.Brands_Grid: Grid layout of partner brands (MAK, Varroc, Gulf, etc.).
specific_pages.Brand_Detail_Page: Shows all products for a selected brand. Includes sidebar with filters (Category, Price).
specific_pages.Product_Detail: Large image display, specifications, 'Enquire Now' CTA. Use data-testid on CTAs.
specific_pages.Power_Wheels_Program: Showcase of the incentive program. Visually separate with rich gold accents.
specific_pages.Admin_Dashboard: Data-heavy. Use pure Shadcn components, dense grid, high contrast. No cards, use flat rectangular borders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for crisp, technical icons.
Install 'react-fast-marquee' for the continuous brand showcase.
For all images acting as backgrounds, apply a bg-black/60 overlay to guarantee text legibility.
Avoid typical centered text alignment for large content blocks. Left-align text for professional industrial look.
When adding Shadcn components, modify their styles to match the rounded-none, sharp-edge aesthetic.
Create '.js' or '.jsx' files, not '.tsx' files. The environment is configured for React/JS.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Do not create generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Use asymmetrical grids, deep z-index hierarchies, and heavy micro-animations for hover states. Incorporate 'data-testid' aggressively for testing. DO NOT use fully transparent header without backdrop-blur.
